hero.title: The Soul of Scent
hero.subtitle: Experience an olfactory journey guided by neural intelligence and timeless craftsmanship.

story.title: Your Signature, AI-Refined.
story.subtitle: At Perfume GPT, we bypass the chaos of traditional counters. Our proprietary AI engine decodes your olfactory preferences through a series of emotional and environmental triggers.
story.feature1_desc: Digital sequencing of base chords and top note resonances.
story.feature2_desc: Projection optimized for your specific climate and social density.

membership.title: The Elite Circle
membership.subtitle: True luxury is a whisper, not a shout. Our exclusive membership offers a sanctuary for those who seek the truly bespoke.
membership.benefit1_desc: Monthly AI-crafted fragrances tailored to your evolving seasons and moods.
membership.benefit2_desc: Early access to extremely limited editions synthesized by guest master perfumers.
membership.benefit3_desc: 24/7 access to your personal AI scent consultant and bespoke layering guides.

discovery.title: AI-Powered Fragrance Shopping
discovery.subtitle: A personalized shopping experience that helps you find your perfect scent without the hassle of trying dozens of products.
discovery.step1_desc: Simply answer a few short questions, and our AI will capture your unique style.
discovery.step2_desc: Our system cross-references your preferences with thousands of authentic perfumes to find the perfect match.
discovery.step3_desc: Receive a curated list of perfumes. Shop with confidence, and we'll deliver them straight to your door.
discovery.final_title: Find your true signature scent quickly and accurately.
discovery.final_desc: We simplify the selection process, turning a complex search into an effortless, time-saving, and highly personalized shopping journey.

philosophy.quote: "Scent is the most intense form of memory."
philosophy.p1: PERFUME GPT was founded on a simple yet radical idea: that the ancient art of perfumery should be personal, precise, and profoundly intelligent.
philosophy.p2: We combined the sensitivity of world-class "noses" with the analytical power of advanced AI to bridge the gap between human emotion and chemical composition.

sourcing.title: Sourcing
sourcing.desc: We travel the globe to source the highest quality raw materials from sustainable estates.

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.desc: Our AI engine analyzes millions of sensory data points to understand human olfactory resonance.

crafting.title: Crafting
crafting.desc: Each bottle is finished by hand in our atelier, ensuring the human touch remains at our core.

location.title: Visit our atelier
location.desc: You can visit our boutique to experience the fragrances in person. The map below shows our current flagship location.
location.province: Quy Nhon Dong, Gia Lai Province

support_page.title: How Can We Assist?
support_page.subtitle: Our dedicated team is here to guide you through your olfactory journey
support_page.form_message_placeholder: How can we help you today?

key_points.protection_desc: Your data is encrypted and secure

sections.collect_desc: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, preferences, and AI consultation responses to provide personalized fragrance recommendations.
sections.use_desc: We use your data to improve our AI algorithms, provide personalized experiences, process orders, and send you relevant updates about products and services.
sections.ai_desc: Your consultation data helps train our AI models. All data is anonymized and aggregated for machine learning purposes.
sections.security_desc: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits to protect your personal information.
sections.rights_desc: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal data at any time. Contact our support team for assistance.

sections.acceptance_desc: By accessing and using Perfume GPT AI services, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
sections.license_desc: Permission is granted to temporarily access the materials on Perfume GPT AI's website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only.
sections.ai_desc: Our AI consultation service provides personalized fragrance recommendations. Results are based on algorithmic analysis and should be considered as suggestions.
sections.product_desc: We strive to provide accurate product descriptions and pricing. However, we do not warrant that product descriptions or other content is accurate, complete, or error-free.
sections.liability_desc: In no event shall Perfume GPT AI or its suppliers be liable for any damages arising out of the use or inability to use our services.

ingredients_page.subtitle: Explore the raw molecular heritage that defines our syntheses.

categories.resins_desc: Omani Frankincense, Aged Labdanum, Somalian Myrrh
categories.florals_desc: Grasse Jasmine Grandiflorum, Bulgarian Damask Rose, Florentine Iris
categories.woods_desc: Mysore Sandalwood, Indonesian Oud, Caledonian Cedar
categories.neutrals_desc: Ethical Ambergris, Molecular Musk, Clean Vetiver

gifting_page.subtitle: Bestow the luxury of a personal olfactory journey upon another.
gifting_page.physical_desc: A hand-packaged selection of our permanent collection, allowing them to find their initial resonance before the AI synthesis.
gifting_page.digital_desc: An invitation to our AI-powered consultation. The gift of a bespoke molecular signature delivered instantly via the digital registry.
